headline: Dirty SOX
summary: The 30 semiconductor stocks in the Philadelphia SOX Index were up an average of 73% year-to-date through 5/11/26. Read more here.

headline: Nvidia Defies the Decline in Chip Stocks
summary: Stocks of most chip companies were getting hit, besides Nvidia. Texas Instruments, Samsung Electronics, ASML stocks were all down more than 2%, while shares of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing were down 1.

headline: Assessing Texas Instruments (TXN) Valuation After A Strong Multi‑Month Share Price Run
summary: Texas Instruments stock: why recent performance is catching attention Texas Instruments (TXN) has caught investor attention after solid recent returns, with the stock up 6.0% over the past week, about 39% over the past month, and roughly 35% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Texas Instruments. headline: Chips Push the S&P 500 to 7,400, Supercycle or the Last Act of a Bubble?
summary: Monday was one of those sessions where the headline number - a modest 0.2% gain on the S&P 500 - doesn't begin to capture what's actually happening underneath the surface.
